tasks.title: AI Security Solution Demo
tasks.prompt:
Provide a 1 minute video demo of your product. Please *only* post a video demo of your product or prototype. Videos longer than 1 minute will not be viewed:

Prototype – AI-Driven CyRARR for OT/ICS/SCADA Networks

“Let me introduce you to Giza—our flagship AI-powered cybersecurity engine, built on the CyRARR framework. Giza is purpose-built for complex industrial environments where downtime is not an option.

At the core, we combine three critical technology pillars: sub-millisecond threat mitigation, Zero Trust Architecture, and seamless OT/IT integration.

Surrounding this core are advanced differentiators:

Self-healing capabilities,

Post-quantum cryptography, and

Automated compliance enforcement.

All of this happens autonomously—no human bottlenecks, no delays—making Giza the first true AI security agent purpose-built for critical infrastructure.”
